caption:
40% of your hours. 15% of your revenue.

That math is a trap. One client consuming nearly half your calendar while paying a fraction of what they actually cost you in energy and opportunity.

Most fractional operators stay too long because the fear of the exit feels bigger than the cost of staying. It is not.

The move: replace their revenue before you have the conversation. Land one new client. Then another. Write two sentences. Give 30 days. Done.

I did this with a $4,200 retainer in 2023. The client thanked me. My margin doubled that quarter.

Save this for when you are ready to make the call.
